Commentaire sur l'élimination
Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: We have chosen to use site specific emission factors until our CEMS are fully operational.  The stack testing data may not accurately represent the emissions over the year and may underestimate NOx and SOx emission due to the short period of sampling.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Foundation Report on the Cement Manufacturing Sector -- June 18, 2004  Table T-6 14.4ug/T clinker  14.4 ug x 1E-6 g/ug x 893,540 T clinker 2006 = 0.125 grams  Stack tests are planned for 2006 which will results in a measured HCB value for reference in the

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: we used site specific emission factors instead of stack testing data as we would like to error on the conservative side until our CEMS are completely operational

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: The plant sent 88 T of steel balls for recycling,much more than last year.  The grinding balls contained on average 17% chromium to increase hardness.  Therefore:  88T * .17 % = 14.96 T

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Change due to more steel balls sent for recylcing to Kimco, otherwise estimated stack release is within 10% of last year

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site
